twitter.content: Timmy, i’ve paid more than $100 million in taxes. I’ve created thousands of jobs, which enabled thousands of people to feed their families. I’ve contributed millions to wounded warriors, pediatric aids and support 1400 African children. And what have you accomplished in life?

posts.raw_content:
1. Eliminate no fault divorce. No alimony. Child support paid by the loser in court.
2. Use tax code to financially incentivize childbirth and one parent staying at home to raise the kids.
3. Daycare is not subsidized 
4. The longer the first monogamous marriage, the larger the financial rewards.


5. Establish a default prenuptial agreement that applies to every marriage.
6. In an at fault divorce court case, loser gives over all post wedding day accumulated assets to the winning spouse.

7. Other ideas?
posts.author: NecturusMaculosus
posts.title: Wanna encourage more permanent child bearing marriages?
posts.content:
1. Eliminate no fault divorce. No alimony. Child support paid by the loser in court.

  2. Use tax code to financially incentivize childbirth and one parent staying at home to raise the kids.

  3. Daycare is not subsidized

  4. The longer the first monogamous marriage, the larger the financial rewards.

  5. Establish a default prenuptial agreement that applies to every marriage.

  6. In an at fault divorce court case, loser gives over all post wedding day accumulated assets to the winning spouse.

  7. Other ideas?

posts.title:
This graphic truly says it all. I guess it depends how you want to define “third-world country.” 

One country. 71% of all H-1B approvals. 

This isn’t a global talent pipeline. It’s a single-origin funnel.

Result? Laid off Americans with fewer jobs to fill.

quotedTweet.content:
We need to cancel the H1B and other work visa scams if we want to avoid becoming another 3rd world country.

We need a 95% reduction in international student visas.

There is zero high skilled labor shortage in the USA.
